prompt: A favicon icon, 1024x1024. Minimal geometric design: a simple eye or camera lens shape made of thin green lines (hex #9ece6a) on a pure black background (#08080c). The shape is constructed from clean geometric arcs and circles — think of a stylized eye formed by two intersecting arcs with a small circle in the center. Very minimal, no gradients, no shading, just thin crisp vector-like lines. The icon must be recognizable even at 16x16 pixels. No text, no labels.
